user.title: Shelly Wall Display X2i RPC
user.description: Connect directly to your Shelly display RPC endpoint.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Shelly RPC endpoint

call_rpc.name: Call RPC method
call_rpc.description: Call any RPC method on the configured Shelly display.

entry_id.description: Optional. If omitted, first configured display is used.

method.name: Method
method.description: RPC method to call, for example Ui.Screen.Set
